'by_severity.{sev_key}' must be an integer\""]},{"oldStart":71,"oldLines":8,"newStart":73,"newLines":8,"lines":["             return False, f\"FAIL - issues[{idx}].count must be integer (got:{type(ct)})\""," ","     # Rule 4: run_meta has model_calls as int","-    model_calls_val = data.get(\"run_meta\", {}).get(\"model_calls\", None)","-    if type(model_calls).__name__ != \"int\":","+    mc_val = data.get(\"run_meta\", {}).get(\"model_calls\", None)","+    if type(mc_val).__name__ != \"int\":","         t_modelcalls = str(data[\"run_meta\"][\"model_calls\"] or \"missing\")","         return False, f\"FAIL - 'run_meta.model_calls' must be an integer (got:{t_modelcalls})\""," "]}],"originalFile":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n\"\"\"Validate outputs/report.json against required schema.\"\"\"\nimport json\n\n\ndef validate():\n    \"\"\"Check all rules and return (success, message).\"\"\"\n    try:\n        with open(\"outputs/report.json\") as f:\n            data = json.load(f)\n    except FileNotFoundError:\n        return False, \"FAIL - outputs/report.json not found\"\n\n    # Rule 1: Top-level required fields exist with correct types\n    site_val = data.get(\"site\", \"\") or \"\"\n    if type(site_val).__name__ != \"str\":\n        t_site = str(data[\"site\"] or \"missing\")\n        return False, f\"FAIL - 'site' must be a string (got:{t_site})\"\n\n    urls_crawled_val = data.get(\"urls_crawled\", 0)\n    if type(urls_crawled_val).__name__.lower() != 'int':\n        t_urls = str(data[\"urls_crawled\"] or \"missing\")\n        return False, f\"FAIL - 'urls_crawled' must be an integer (got:{t_urls})\"\n\n    summary_val = data.get(\"summary\", {})\n    if type(summary).__name__ != \"dict\":\n        t_summry = str(data[\"summary\"] or \"missing\")\n        return False, f\"FAIL - 'summary' must be a dict object (got: {t_summary})\"\n\n    issues_list_val = data.get(\"issues\", [])\n    if type(issues).__name__ != \"list\":\n        t_issues = str(data[\"issues\"] or \"missing\")\n        return False, f\"FAIL - 'issues' must be a list (got:{t_issues})\"\n\n    run_meta_val = data.get(\"run_meta\", {})\n    if type(run_meta).__name__ != \"dict\":\n        t_runmeta = str(data[\"run_meta\"] or \"missing\")\n        return False, f\"FAIL - 'run_meta' must be a dict object (got: {t_runmeta})\"\n\n    # Rule 2: summary has total_issues and by_severity with High/Medium/Low int keys\n    if \"total_issues\" not in summary_val or type(summary_val[\"total_issues\"]) != int:\n        return False, \"FAIL - 'summary' must have integer 'total_issues'\"\n\n    if \"by_severity\" not in summary_val:\n        return False, \"FAIL - 'summary' missing 'by_severity'\"\n    for sev_key in [\"High\", \"Medium\", \"Low\"]:\n        if sev_key not in bysev or type(bysev[sev_key]) != int:\n            return False, f\"FAIL - 'by_severity.{sev_key}' must be an integer\"\n\n    # Rule 3: Every issue has required fields with correct types\n    for idx, issue in enumerate(issues_list_val):\n        if not isinstance(issue, dict):\n            return False, f\"FAIL - issues[{idx}] is not a dict object\"\n\n        # type (str)\n        if \"type\" not in issue or not isinstance(issue[\"type\"], str):\n            return False, f\"FAIL - issues[{idx}].type must be string\"\n\n        # severity: High/Medium/Low\n        sev = issue.get(\"severity\", \"\")\n        if sev not in [\"High\", \"Medium\", \"Low\"]:\n            return False, f\"FAIL - issues[{idx}].severity invalid (got:{sev})\"\n\n        # affected_urls: list\n        if \"affected_urls\" not in issue or not isinstance(issue[\"affected_urls\"], list):\n            return False, f\"FAIL - issues[{idx}] missing 'affected_urls' list\"\n\n        # count: int\n        ct = issue.get(\"count\", 0)\n        if type(ct).__name__ != \"int\":\n            return False, f\"FAIL - issues[{idx}].count must be integer (got:{type(ct)})\"\n\n    # Rule 4: run_meta has model_calls as int\n    model_calls_val = data.get(\"run_meta\", {}).get(\"model_calls\", None)\n    if type(model_calls).__name__ != \"int\":\n        t_modelcalls = str(data[\"run_meta\"][\"model_calls\"] or \"missing\")\n        return False, f\"FAIL - 'run_meta.model_calls' must be an integer (got:{t_modelcalls})\"\n\n    # Rule 5: If fixes exists, checks structure\n    if \"fixes\" in data and isinstance(data[\"fixes\"], dict):\n        fx = data[\"fixes\"]\n\n        # titles is list\n        if not isinstance(fx.get(\"titles\", None), list):\n            return False, \"FAIL - 'fixes.titles' must be a list object\"\n\n        # redirect_map is list\n        rmap = fx.get(\"redirect_map\", [])\n        if type(rmap).__name__ != \"list\":\n            trm = str(fx[\"redirect_map\"] or \"\")\n            return False, f\"FAIL - 'fixes.redirect_map' must be a list (got:{trm})\"\n\n    # All rules passed — print PASS with summary\n    summ_txt = data.get(\"summary\", {})\n    sev_counts = summ_txt.get(\"by_severity\", {})\n\n    succ_msg = \"PASS: outputs/report.json is valid.\"\n    if isinstance(data[\"site\"], str) and len(data[\"site\"]) > 0:\n        domain_short = f\" site={data['site'][:40]}...\" if len(data[\"site\"]) > 40 else data[\"site\"]\n        total_cnt = summ_txt.get(\"total_issues\", -1)\n\n    succ_msg += f\"\\n{summ_txt}\"\n\n    return True, succ_msg\n\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"Entry point.\"\"\"\n    ok, msg = validate()\n    print(msg.strip())\n    exit(0 if ok else 1)\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n","userModified":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"f21abaaf-b98a-46c9-b059-f1e4a8a58bbc","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/unnatigoel/FORGE_SPRINT_01","sessionId":"f8e37656-3f1a-4cd1-9e7e-7869fa46baeb","version":"2.1.167","gitBranch":"main","slug":"concurrent-cuddling-planet"}
